creator: jimmiejaz@gmail.com
text:
===>  Building for ImageMagick-6.7.7.7
    /bin/sh ./config/mkinstalldirs . ltdl/
    cp ./ltdl/argz_.h ltdl/argz.h-t
    mv ltdl/argz.h-t ltdl/argz.h
    gmake  all-am
    gmake[1]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/graphics/ImageMagick/work/ImageMagick-6.7.7-7'
      CC     coders/coders_art_la-art.lo
      CC     coders/coders_avs_la-avs.lo
      CC     coders/coders_bgr_la-bgr.lo

      CC     coders/coders_hald_la-hald.lo
      CC     coders/coders_hdr_la-hdr.lo
    coders/hald.c: In function 'ReadHALDImage':
    coders/hald.c:128: error: expected '#pragma omp' clause before 'dynamic_number_threads'
    gmake[1]: *** [coders/coders_hald_la-hald.lo] Error 1
    gmake[1]: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
    gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/graphics/ImageMagick/work/ImageMagick-6.7.7-7'
    gmake: *** [all] Error 2
    *** Error code 1

Fix: 

make config and remove all threaded options is a work around. I haven't changed the options that were selected for many releases. 

As for a real fix, it's beyond me, sorry.

These OPTIONS fail with the error above:
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=IMAGEMAGICK_16BIT_PIXEL
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=IMAGEMAGICK_BZLIB
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=IMAGEMAGICK_DJVU
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=IMAGEMAGICK_DOT
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=IMAGEMAGICK_FFTW
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=IMAGEMAGICK_FONTCONFIG

OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=IMAGEMAGICK_JPEG2000

OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=IMAGEMAGICK_TTF
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=IMAGEMAGICK_WEBP
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=IMAGEMAGICK_WMF
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=THREADS
